releaseNotes.zh-CN:
DataWhere 1.2.9

新功能
- SQL 工作台新增「执行选中」按钮，支持选中部分 SQL 单独执行
- Ctrl+Enter 快捷键自动适配
- 执行选中和执行全部按钮状态独立
- 去掉快捷键提示文字
releaseNotes.en-US:
DataWhere 1.2.9

New Features
- Added "Execute Selection" button to SQL workspace, supporting partial SQL execution
- Ctrl+Enter shortcut auto-adapts to selection state
- Execute Selection and Execute All button states are independent
- Removed shortcut hint text
